import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "tradeId": string;
  "symbol": string;
  "side": string;
  "qty": number;
  "price": number;
  "value": number;
  "trader": string;
  "venue": string;
  "executedAt": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Trade Ledger",
  "description": "Virtualized 5,000-row ledger with sticky ID and sticky actions.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "compact",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 560,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": false,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": true,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": true,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "enablePinnedColumns": true,
  "enableVirtualization": true,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "tradeId",
      "label": "Trade #",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "pinned": "start",
      "width": 110
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "symbol",
      "label": "Symbol",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 90,
      "badgeVariants": {
        "AAPL": "default",
        "MSFT": "secondary",
        "GOOG": "outline",
        "AMZN": "default",
        "NVDA": "secondary",
        "META": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "side",
      "label": "Side",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 80,
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Buy": "default",
        "Sell": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "qty",
      "label": "Quantity",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "width": 110
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "price",
      "label": "Price",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "width": 120
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "value",
      "label": "Notional",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "width": 140
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "trader",
      "label": "Trader",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 160
    },
    {
      "id": "c8",
      "key": "venue",
      "label": "Venue",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 120
    },
    {
      "id": "c9",
      "key": "executedAt",
      "label": "Executed",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 140
    },
    {
      "id": "c10",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "pinned": "end",
      "width": 60
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
